characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Badass Crew: They are a bunch of kids (and an adult, in Dudley's case) who solve mysteries and protect their home in the Museum from danger. Family of Choice: For each other, they are a surrogate family and they love each other as one. Ragtag Bunch of Misfits: Surely they are not the most probably perfect group you have seen, but they are your perfect heroes and a group formed by a Human of 6 years, a Mummy princess, a Dodo, a Dinosaur, a Monkey and a Buffalo. Save the Villain: They save Mr Peabody and Lonny when they are about to get devoured by angry lions, though most of them were reluctant.

characters.name: As a Whole
characters.description: Badass Crew: They are a bunch of kids (and an adult, in Dudley's case) who solve mysteries and protect their home in the Museum from danger. Family of Choice: For each other, they are a surrogate family and they love each other as one. Ragtag Bunch of Misfits: Surely they are not the most probably perfect group you have seen, but they are your perfect heroes and a group formed by a Human of 6 years, a Mummy princess, a Dodo, a Dinosaur, a Monkey and a Buffalo. Save the Villain: They save Mr Peabody and Lonny when they are about to get devoured by angry lions, though most of them were reluctant.

characters.name: Ridley Jones
characters.description: Action Girl: Well, given that she share her surname with a legendary explorer, is obvious. Adorably Precocious Child Badass Adorable: Ah yes. A cute little girl who can be seen taking care of everything strange she runs into. Blue Is Heroic: Her pants and shirt are blue and she is the protagonist. Deadpan Snarker: Not as much as Fred or Ismat, but she can have her moments.

characters.name: Peaches
characters.description: Badass Adorable: Like mostly everyone in her team. Badasses Wear Bandanas: She has one under her helmet. A Day in the Limelight: In "Fly Like An Eagle", she has to fix a broken spaceship without the help of the others, being the protagonist of the episode. Deep South: She speaks with a Southern accent. Gadgeteer Genius: She builds a lot of inventions that her friends use in their adventures.

characters.name: Dudley
characters.description: Big Brother Instinct: Has it during the episode where he and Dante find a lost egg and he starts to wish that it is another dodo and take care of it. Blue Is Heroic: His feathers are blue, and he is one of the protagonists. Dead Pan Snarker: Can be this sometimes, especially when he does not agree with Ridley's or the others plans. Death Glare: He give one to Ridley when she makes a joke about eggs The Determinator: In Final of Season 3, as said below inOOC Is Serious Business.

characters.name: Dante
characters.description: Beware the Nice Ones: He will be your friend and support you, but if he’s invoked, then you'll better be very, VERY far. Big Brother Instinct: When he and Dudley find a sea turtle egg and start to take care of it, believing it is another dinosaur's egg. The Big Guy: His role in the Eyes of the Museum. Companion Cube: His tail, of all the things, with which he talks to and has arguements with. Dumb Muscle:Played With: He is far more intelligent then other example, but he still not being the sharpest tool of the shed.

characters.name: Fred
characters.description: A nonbinary bison who's so full of themselves, yet cares a lot about Ismat. Badass Adorable: Like the rest of the team. Deadpan Snarker: Oh yes, sure they are. Second just to Ismat in this. Hates Being Called Cute: Do NOT call Fred "cute" or "adorable", they will not take it well. "I Want" Song: "Head of the Herd" Where they sings about their desire to be the leader of their herd.

characters.name: Ismat
characters.description: A mummy princess who prefers to dress modern. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: Like Fred, she is bossy, arrogant and sometimes selfish, but she cares about her friends and will be surely there for them. Royal Brat:Down Played, She is a princess and a bossy one sometimes, but she is a heroic girl with a right sense of what's best. Royals Who Actually Do Something: She is a Queen despite her young age, and one of the Museum's heroes and our protagonists. Spoiled Sweet: She is a spoiled little princess, but her heart is in the right place.
